name: item-group
visual_summary: Item-group is a UI component that displays a collection of related items as a list or grid. It is typically used when a user needs to view multiple items at once, such as product options or settings. This component is often accompanied by checkboxes or select menus for user input.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: item-group
Description: Item-group is a UI component that displays a collection of related items as a list or grid. It is typically used when a user needs to view multiple items at once, such as product options or settings. This component is often accompanied by checkboxes or select menus for user input.
Style: e.g. default, compact, boxed
Interactions: e.g. clickable, draggable
Tags: item-group, collection, list, grid, related-items

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
